---
title: "Marian Legge"
---

## Marian Legge

**Dates:** (1814-1890)

**Maiden name:** (Rogers)

### Description

sister of Frederick Rogers, 1st Lord Blachford

### Biography

CMY describes her as a Devon acquaintance; her grandmother had been godmother to WCY (1854), third sister of Frederick Rogers, 1st Lord Blachford. She married (1842) the Rev. and Hon. H. Legge.

### Letters

- Letter from Dec 1st [1854]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
